routes.title: BlackPebble — Professional Solana Trading & Utility Platform
routes.description: A professional Solana trading and utility platform for memecoin traders: paper trading, market discovery, trader reputation and trust scores, leaderboards, portfolio tracking, SOL recovery, and wallet cleanup tools.

routes.title: Markets — Trending Solana Tokens & Analytics | BlackPebble
routes.description: Discover trending Solana tokens with live price, market cap, liquidity, and volume. Token analytics, watchlists, and new token discovery for memecoin traders.

routes.title: Discover Traders & Opportunities | BlackPebble
routes.description: Find top Solana traders, trending tokens, and new opportunities. Explore the BlackPebble reputation network and market discovery tools.

routes.title: Solana Trader Leaderboard — Rankings by P&L | BlackPebble
routes.description: Trader leaderboards ranking Solana memecoin traders by realized profit and loss across daily, weekly, and all-time periods.

routes.title: Portfolio Tracking — Positions & P&L | BlackPebble
routes.description: Track open Solana positions, realized and unrealized P&L, ROI, and full trade history in one professional paper-trading dashboard.

routes.title: Trader Activity Feed | BlackPebble
routes.description: Follow public trader activity, calls, and performance across the BlackPebble Solana trading community.

routes.title: Solana Wallet Utilities & Trader Tools | BlackPebble
routes.description: Standalone Solana wallet utilities and trader tools: SOL recovery, wallet cleanup, trade planner, and trading journal.

routes.title: SOL Recovery — Recover Rent SOL from Token Accounts | BlackPebble
routes.description: Recover trapped rent SOL from unused and empty Solana token accounts. Scan your wallet, see recoverable SOL, and close accounts on-chain with recovery history and wallet health analytics.

routes.title: Solana Wallet Cleanup — Close Empty Token Accounts | BlackPebble
routes.description: Clean up your Solana wallet by reviewing and closing empty token accounts, surfacing dust and recoverable rent, and keeping your wallet healthy. Manual, user-initiated cleanup.

routes.title: Trade Planner — Plan Entries, Size & Exits | BlackPebble
routes.description: Plan Solana trades with position sizing, risk, buy limit orders, and automated take-profit and stop-loss multi-target exits.

routes.title: Trading Journal — Record & Review Trades | BlackPebble
routes.description: Keep a Solana trading journal to record trades and review your performance and decisions over time.

routes.title: About BlackPebble — Solana Paper Trading & Utilities
routes.description: Learn what BlackPebble is: a professional Solana trading and utility platform for memecoin traders combining paper trading, reputation, recovery, and wallet tools.

routes.title: Features — Solana Trading, Reputation & Wallet Tools | BlackPebble
routes.description: Explore BlackPebble's features: live paper trading, market discovery, portfolio tracking, trade planning, leaderboards, trader reputation, SOL recovery, and wallet cleanup.

routes.title: Vision & Roadmap | BlackPebble
routes.description: BlackPebble's vision and roadmap: the tools that are live today and the future direction for Solana traders and communities.
